pages.title: Oro De La Presión
pages.tagline: Turn pressure into pure gold on this mid-tempo triumph.

pages.body: This F-minor anthem chronicles a powerful journey from deep struggle to triumphant resilience. Starting as a brooding void at 96 BPM, the track blends gritty drums with warm basslines that build toward an explosive brass-heavy climax. The vocal delivery shifts dynamically between introspective whispers in low registers and chest-voice belting during soaring choruses. It transforms personal pain into golden success through relentless creation, celebrating cultural pride while rejecting external validation. Every bar turns doubt into fire, guiding the listener from darkness until they stand tall with a heart that remains pure gold.
pages.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (96 BPM) F-minor track blending gritty trap drums with atmospheric synth pads and warm basslines that build from a brooding void into an explosive, brass-heavy climax where the vocal delivery shifts between Spanish melodic hooks and aggressive English verses about turning struggle into gold.

pages.text:
Este verano se siente diferente,
pero esto no es vacaciones,
esto es presión,
esto es fuego,
esto es cuando el vacío aprende mi nombre
Construye,
sube,
pressure make go,
la presión hace oro
Estamos afuera now,
feet on the ground,
let the bass roll up,
del vacío hasta el oro
I had too much weight sitting heavy on my shoulders,
demasiada noche fría,
too many dreams getting older,
same wall,
same clock,
same fight with time,
same voice in the dark saying
You ain't gon' shine,
por el tambor sonar like a war call,
brass hair hard made the whole block tall,
one deep breath then I stood up tall

had to take a break
Take it all,

I was down in the void where the lights don't show,
now I beat on the dark till the whole thing glow
Yo no estaba roto, me estaban formando, yo
no estaba muerto, me estaban quemando,
suelta el miedo,
llena el pecho con fire,
step to the noise,
climb a little higher,
no shame in the scars,
no fear in the climb
El mundo grita duro,
I'ma turn it into fire,
I'ma turn it into fire,

I'ma turn it into fire

bênimos,
Ben5,
now we turn it into gold,
oro en el pecho,
gold in the soul,
milk from the pressure,
raised by the cold,
venimos del boy,
now we turn it into gold
Ovejame un pesco,
que lo sepa todo el mundo,
déjalo arder,
déjalo ver,
mírame crecer,
venimos del boy, now we turn it into gold
Ovejame un pesco
Que lo sepa todo el mundo
Deja el orden, déjalo ver,
mírame crecer,

Mente clara,
heart bold,
manos arriba,
still go,
new me,
still loaded,
alma limpia,
still glowing
De Queens to the island,
de la isla to the sky,
Boricua y Quique,
fuego en my eyes
Plata no perico,
ripiao,
drums in the street,
808 under my chest,
brass under my feet
No more waiting on permission,
no more begging for a name,
no more hiding all the vision,
no more making joy feel shame
They laugh when the tools came out,
said it ain't real when the new waves sprout
But I built with the sparks,
built with the scars,
built with the bass and I aimed at stars
Tú tiras sombra,
yo la vuelvo sol,
tú tiras piedra,
yo construyo control
Tú can call it fake,
I call it freak,
I came from the void,
now the gold is me
No necesito tu corona, no necesito tu gay
No necesito tu corona, no necesito tu gay
No necesito tu duda, no pago tu weight
Have your joy but keep your spirit,
toca el fuego,
keep your name
Taste the world but don't disappear in it,
pleasure don't have to become pain
Pasa el plato,
press,
forgive me,
spray your glass and bless the air
Estamos aquí un minuto,
feel the life you want while you're here
Venimos del voy,
now we turn it into gold,
oro en el pecho
Gold in the soul, built from the pressure
Raised by the cold,
venimos del voy,
now we turn it into gold
No we ever pass gold, que lo sepa todo el mundo
Déjalo arder,
déjalo ver,
mírame crecer
Venimos del voy, now we turn it into gold
Escucha,
no tienes que contestar cada alarma
No tienes que cargar cada fantasma
No tienes que quedar sin ti,
no tienes que quedar sin ti
Dejarte pequeño porque te conocieron en la oscuridad
Some nights are for healing
Some nights are for hands in the air
Pero algunas noches
Algunas noches
Tú mismo construyes la corona
¿Quién te hizo?
La presión
¿Quién te crió?
La lección
¿Quién dudó?
Un montón
¿Quién brilla?
El corazón
My mind go quiet
Heart go wide
Gumbo rolling
Fire inside
Man
Mente clara
Alma alive
Este verano viste la lágrima
I'm not just dope
Soy fuego con memoria
Every loss melted down in the gloria
Every no got folded in steel
Every star turned proof I'm real
Go can bang, go can shine
But I want worth that
Can't define
Más alto que prenda, más alto que rings
Higher in price, higher in kings
Del vacío al fuego
Del fuego al molde
Del molde al fuego
Al brillo
Del brillo
PESCO
Venimos del boi
Now we turn it into gold
Oro en el pecho
Gold in the soul
Built from the pressure

Now we burn it into gold
But we ain't been PESCO
Que lo sepa todo el mundo
Más alto que oro
Más alto que fear
Higher than what they said we were
Todavía aquí
Aire
Estamos afuera en la
Aire
Feet on the ground
Mente clara
Oro
From the boy
Cast the gold
Venimos del boi
Now we burn it into gold
Feet on the ground
